title: Defense Evasion Technique Detected
description: Detects defense evasion techniques including log deletion, audit daemon tampering and history file clearing.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT QIDNAME(qid) as EventName, sourceIP, destinationIP, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) as LogSource, payload, starttime FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%/var/log%' OR payload ILIKE '%auditd%' OR payload ILIKE '%history -c%' OR payload ILIKE '%rsyslog%') ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 300 SECONDS
